hooks.command: file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q '\.dart$'; then dart analyze "$file_path" 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'error|warning' | head -10 || true; fi
if [ -f pubspec.yaml ]; then dart analyze lib/ 2>/dev/null | tail -3 || true; fi
